goalSettings.editSubtitle: Update your FIRE goal and investment plan
goalSettings.createSubtitle: Set your target assets and investment plan
goalSettings.baseCurrencyHint: The currency used to total and display assets. Changing it converts your target amounts at the current rate.
goalSettings.minInputHint: Enter at least {amount} based on your monthly investment
goalSettings.minRecommendHint: At least {amount} recommended based on your monthly investment
goalSettings.tooLongWarn: Over 50 years to goal — consider raising your monthly investment or lowering your target.
goalSettings.estimateNote: Excludes current assets. Based on a simple compound interest estimate.
goalSettings.changeCurrencyDesc: Amounts entered will be converted at the current rate.
goalSettings.fxFailed: Failed to fetch exchange rate. Please try again later.
goalSettings.enterTarget: Please enter a target asset amount.
goalSettings.minTargetMsg: Please enter at least {amount} for the target.
goalSettings.monthlyPositive: Monthly investment must be greater than 0.
goalSettings.target12x: Target must be at least 12x the monthly investment ({amount}).
goalSettings.minReturn: Expected annual return must be at least 3%.

etfAnalysis.title: ETF Analysis & Compare
etfAnalysis.subtitle: CAGR · MDD · Volatility · Yield · Expense
etfAnalysis.notFoundHint: Please check the US ETF (e.g. SPY, QQQ) or KR ETF code (e.g. 069500).
etfAnalysis.enterTickerPrompt: Enter a ticker and tap Analyze.
etfAnalysis.supportHint: Supports US ETFs (SPY, QQQ, etc.) and KR ETFs (069500, etc.)
etfAnalysis.commonPeriodNote: Inception dates differ; CAGR · MDD · Volatility are compared over the common period since {date}.
etfAnalysis.disclaimer: * Based on Yahoo Finance data · use as reference only, not investment advice.
etfAnalysis.sameTickers: The two tickers are identical. Please enter different tickers.
etfAnalysis.loadError: An error occurred while loading data.

tooltips.cagr: Compound annual growth rate. The rate at which it would have grown each year since inception. Higher is better.
tooltips.mdd: Max Drawdown. The largest drop from a peak. The smaller the absolute value (closer to 0), the lower the risk.
tooltips.volatility: Annual volatility. Standard deviation of monthly returns, annualized. Lower means a more stable price.
tooltips.beta: Market sensitivity vs. the S&P 500. 1 moves with the market; above 1 moves more.
tooltips.ter: Total Expense Ratio. Annual cost of running the ETF. Lower is better for long-term returns.
tooltips.dividendYield: Dividends paid over the last 12 months relative to the current price.

etfAnalysis.singleSummary: {ticker} is an ETF with {parts}. Its risk is {risk}.
etfAnalysis.closingTied: The two ETFs are broadly similar.
etfAnalysis.closingLongTerm: Well suited for long-term regular investing.
etfAnalysis.closingDividend: A good fit for investors seeking dividend income.

etfBacktest.title: ETF Backtest
etfBacktest.sameTicker: The compare ticker is the same as the base ticker.
etfBacktest.notFound: Ticker not found. Please check it.
etfBacktest.loadError: An error occurred while loading data.

tooltips.dca: Investing a fixed amount every month. Buys more when prices are low and less when high, lowering the average cost.
tooltips.cagr: Compound annual growth rate. The total return converted to an annual rate. Higher is better.
tooltips.mdd: Max Drawdown. The largest drop from a peak during the period. Smaller absolute value means lower risk.
tooltips.totalReturn: Total return of the current value versus the invested principal.

etfBacktest.subtitle: Historical {dca} return simulation

dialog.addHoldingInfo: Enter your current quantity and average price. This will be combined with later transactions to calculate gains.
